identity.name: AgriPOS
identity.target_audience: Agricultural business owners, branch managers, cashiers

headings.usage: Use for all page titles, section headers, and modal titles. Tracking tight.

body.usage: Use for all data tables, inputs, labels, and long-form text. Excellent for numbers.

primary.name: Deep Forest Green
primary.description: Used for primary actions, active states, and brand identity. Represents growth and stability.

secondary.name: Earthy Beige
secondary.description: Used for page backgrounds (outside of cards) to reduce eye strain and add warmth.

accent.name: Harvest Gold
accent.description: Used sparingly for warnings, highlights, or 'Special' price schemes.

layout.spacing: Generous (p-6, p-8) for containers, Tight (gap-4) for data grids.
layout.container_style: Flat cards with 1px border (border-slate-200) and subtle rounded corners (rounded-lg). No heavy shadows.
layout.sidebar_style: Fixed dark sidebar, collapsible on mobile.
layout.responsive_rules: Mobile-first. Tables must have horizontal scroll on mobile. POS interface must be touch-friendly (large tap targets).

inputs.style: bg-white border-slate-200 focus:ring-[#1A4D2E] focus:border-[#1A4D2E] rounded-md h-10

visual_enhancers.textures: Subtle noise on the sidebar background to give it a 'premium tool' feel.
visual_enhancers.icons: Lucide React (Default). Use stroke-width={1.5} for a clean, technical look.
visual_enhancers.motion: Micro-interactions only. Hover states on rows/cards. Smooth transitions for modal open/close.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text-to-background ratio is at least 4.5:1.
accessibility.focus_states: Visible focus ring with high contrast color (#1A4D2E).

instructions_to_main_agent: Follow the Bento Grid 'Mode B' for the dashboard layout: high density, data-first.
The Sidebar MUST be dark (#0F172A). The main content area MUST be light (#F5F5F0 background, White cards).
Use 'Manrope' for all Headings (h1-h6) and 'IBM Plex Sans' for body text. Add these fonts via Google Fonts.
The POS interface should be 'Full Screen' capable and have large touch targets for the 'Add to Cart' actions.
For the 'Parent/Repack' system visual: Use a visual hierarchy where Repacks are indented or connected via a line to the Parent product in the list.
Tables must support pagination and filtering. Use Shadcn Table component.
Do NOT use purple or violet gradients. Stick to the Green/Beige/White palette.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, row actions).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop': No generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry and grid tension.
Micro-animations: Add hover states, active states, and focus transitions.
Spacing: Use generous padding inside cards (p-6, p-8) but tight spacing between data points.
Glassmorphism: Use subtle glass effects on sticky headers or modal overlays (backdrop-blur-md).
No 'Robot' Emojis: Use professional Lucide icons instead.
